channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Sunken road, 7th March
item.description:
Sunken road around grid, cycle lane 259 Woolwich Road. Dangerous.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Warped road, 7th March
item.description:
Warped road on junction of Rathmore Rd/Woolwich Rd
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich

item.title: Pot hole on zebra crossing, 7th March
item.description:
Pot hole on zebra crossing
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Way, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive graffiti on the footbridge, 7th March
item.description:
Going over the railway line footbridge on Picketts Lock Lane N9 there is offensive graffiti saying Free Palestine from Hamas there is also other graffiti here.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Picketts Lock Lane, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Offensive up to 2 metres off the ground

item.title: Metre long pothole, 7th March
item.description:
Large, deep pothole on bus route, hard to avoid
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 169, Amherst Drive, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian guardrail damage, 7th March
item.description:
The pedestrian guardrail in front of 145-147 Silver Street N18, by the junction with Haselbury Road, has been severely damaged. This is presumably as a result of a vehicle having collided with it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Silver Street, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tv in alley next to block 46 Cordwell Road SE13 5QY, 7th March
item.description:
2nd reporting

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38-41, Cordwell Road, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked at the drop kerb blocking the entrance., 7th March
item.description:
Unable to exit as car is parked at the drop kerb

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gladstone Avenue, Hornsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping down the back alley, 7th March
item.description:
Flytipping dumped in the alley behind the houses access is down the side of white house flats and 1 Nash Road N9

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nash Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of furniture and mattress now in the road too, 7th March
item.description:
The mattress is now obstructing the road aswell as pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 198-200, Northumberland Park, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed Vauxhall Corsa dumped next to Rixon House, 7th March
item.description:
Yet another untaxed abandoned car dumped on Barnfield Gardens estate. This one is next to Rixon House. Photos taken 7th March 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barnfield Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
